blocks.body: How to count uncountable nouns: a piece of, a cup of — learn how partitives express portions, containers, and units with uncountable nouns.

{ "title": "11. Brief summary", "items": [ "Partitives are constructions for measuring uncountable nouns.", "A piece of is a universal partitive: cake, bread, advice, information, furniture.", "Drinks: a cup of (hot), a glass of (cold), a bottle of. of.", "Use the pattern in the examples.", "Use the pattern in the examples.", "Measurements: a kilo of, a liter of, a pound of.", "Partitives are always used with of + an uncountable noun.", "In the plural, the partitive changes: two pieces of cake, three cups of coffee." ] }
